title: QuietMode
description: QuietMode lets you enjoy Minecraft on your terms: take a break from constant mob aggression, explore, experiment, and build safely – then bring back the danger whenever you’re ready.
body:
**QuietMode** lets you enjoy Minecraft entirely on your own terms. Tired of constant mob attacks? Want to explore, experiment or build without interruptions? QuietMode temporarily silences mob aggression — and when you’re ready for danger again, you can simply switch it back on.

## ✨ Key Features
### Peaceful Mobs
- All normally aggressive mobs stop initiating attacks while QuietMode is enabled.
- Wander through caves, dungeons or villages without the usual stress.

###  Dynamic Aggression
- If you attack a mob first, it will still retaliate - the challenge is always there when you decide.
- Perfect for testing mob farms, redstone contraptions or new bases.

###  Safe Building Environment
- Focus entirely on your creative projects without creepers, skeletons or zombies interrupting you.
  
###  Quick Toggle
- Switch back to normal Minecraft behavior any time with a simple command.
  
###  Bosses
- Withers and Ender dragons work as in vanilla.
  
## 🎯 Why QuietMode?

**Builders:** Work on mega-projects without mobs interfering.

**Developers:** Test structures and mechanics in a live environment.

**Beginners:** Learn Minecraft mechanics in a low-stress setting.

**Streamers:** Create a calm, predictable environment for recording or live streaming.

## ⚙️ How It Works
QuietMode intercepts mob AI to temporarily disable hostile targeting toward players. Mobs behave normally with pathfinding and animations but won’t attack unless provoked. This allows you to explore, build and experiment freely — then instantly restore vanilla difficulty whenever you choose.
